rationale: Educ. Code §48.154 governs tuition allotments for districts contracting to educate students elsewhere. It has no dependency on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts, so no conflict arises.
quote: A school district that contracts for students residing in the district to be educated in another district under Section 25.039(a) is entitled to receive an allotment equal to the total amount of tuition required to be paid by the district under Section 25.039
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this tuition allotment provision.
